mapper.select: SELECT CAST(crt_time AS DATE) AS name, count(*) AS value FROM base_log_login WHERE deleted = false AND crt_time >= #{startDate} AND crt_time <= #{endDate} group by name ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT pro AS name, count(*) AS value FROM base_log_login WHERE deleted = false AND pro IS NOT NULL AND pro <> '' AND pro <> '本地' GROUP BY pro ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10
